programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion; China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg This Weekend
programme.desc: The news doesn't stop when markets close; hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend's biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: David Rubenstein interviews British entrepreneur Nik Storonsky to uncover the stories behind his rise in the financial world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programme.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: David Rubenstein interviews British entrepreneur Nik Storonsky to uncover the stories behind his rise in the financial world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire
programme.desc: An investigation of Iran's shadow fleet, which traffics billions in oil and weapons across the Middle East and Russia, revealing how sanctions evasion sustains the regime.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims. They discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business. She also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion; China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programme.title: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Bloomberg ETF IQ focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry; Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas are joined by leaders in this market.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims. They discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business. She also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.sub-title: The Podcast: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programme.desc: Shell Chief Executive Officer Wael Sawan joins Francine Lacqua to discuss the oil major's controversial strategy around the energy transition, and fostering a culture that shifts from "all-knowing" to "all-learning." He reflects on navigating volatility in the global energy system, emphasizing disciplined decision-making and focusing on what leaders can influence going forward.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.
